description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two metallic blades joined at a central pivot, with each blade extending into a handle. The handles are polygonal and colored a vivid red, forming two large, angular loops for finger placement. The blades are silver-gray, straight, and taper to a pointed tip, suitable for precise cutting tasks. The central joint is flat and appears to be a simple rivet, holding the blades together securely. The handles are symmetrical and lack any visible ergonomic padding or texturing. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the surface.
description: A pair of red-handled, silver-bladed scissors with polygonal finger loops and pointed tips, joined by a central rivet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the silver blades and the angular red handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open, polygonal finger loops and the alignment of the blades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the length of the blades and the geometric handles.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the two red finger loops and the convergence of the blades at the joint.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, polygonal, ambidextrous handles without ergonomic features or padding.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Large, polygonal loops of equal size, no soft inserts or anatomical contours.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
